creator: Calvin Kang
source_text:
Cream top IS the best way to enjoy a coffee. We can throw hands if you disagree. 

#1 concept to grasp while losing fat- find ways to feel full throughout the day. Cream top coffee and zero sugar sodas are my ways of suppressing my appetite

24 servings: per 20grams
Cals: ~68 kcal

Ingredients:

1 pint heavy whipping cream
1 tbsp vanilla bean paste
4-6tbsp Splenda (add more or less to your desired sweetness)
Pinch of salt

Tip: whisk until you get a gravy consistency

#coffee #vanillabean #creamtop

expected.name: Cream top
raw_ingredients: 4-6tbsp Splenda (add more or less to your desired sweetness)
steps: whisk until you get a gravy consistency

notes: Agent-labeled from the frozen Instagram description before viewing parser output.
Accepted after generic nutrition, hashtag, tip-label, and subject-name context signals were tightened.
